name: aliexpress-products-scraper
title: AliExpress Products Scraper - Prices & Catalog Data
description: Collect public AliExpress product catalog data including titles, prices, discounts, ratings, sold counts, images, store names when available, and product URLs.

apify-actor-start.eventDescription: Charged when the run starts to cover browser startup and the residential proxy session. Number of events depends on memory (one per GB, minimum one).

product-scraped.eventDescription: Charged once for each clean AliExpress product saved to the dataset.
